title: Pond's Edge - Middletown Twp, PA - PH&C

contentHtml:
Pond’s Edge is a 197 unit townhouse community on approximately 55 acres in Middletown Township, Delaware County. This residential community project has been a great success, allowing our client to move forward with the opening of the final phase of home construction in late 2023 into 2024. 

Key Features:

  • We procured and managed multiple consultants and contractors to address sitework, retaining walls, pump station design and construction, site electric and lighting, clubhouse construction, and landscape/hardscape features.
  • Developing this land included:
    • Rock blasting
    • 180,000 CY of earth moving
    • Installation of 5,700 SF of large retaining walls
    • Installation of a sewer pump station
    • Coordination of the dry utility work with PECO, Verizon, and Comcast
  • Community features include multiple amenity areas (gazebo, pergola, and hardscaping), and a robust landscape plan with natural surface trails throughout the grounds. We worked with a local Boy Scout Troop to optimize the trail routes, way-finding markers and constructing pedestrian bridges.

Click HERE for more information

This residential community is located directly adjacent to several of our other retail and government projects.
contentText: Pond’s Edge is a 197 unit townhouse community on approximately 55 acres in Middletown Township, Delaware County. This residential community project has been a great success, allowing our client to move forward with the opening of the final phase of home construction in late 2023 into 2024. Key Features: We procured and managed multiple consultants and contractors to address sitework, retaining walls, pump station design and construction, site electric and lighting, clubhouse construction, and landscape/hardscape features. Developing this land included: Rock blasting 180,000 CY of earth moving Installation of 5,700 SF of large retaining walls Installation of a sewer pump station Coordination of the dry utility work with PECO, Verizon, and Comcast Community features include multiple amenity areas (gazebo, pergola, and hardscaping), and a robust landscape plan with natural surface trails throughout the grounds. We worked with a local Boy Scout Troop to optimize the trail routes, way-finding markers and constructing pedestrian bridges.
